mapper.select: SELECT username, student_no, password, role, total_hours, created_at, clazz, grade, college FROM users WHERE student_no = #{studentNo} LIMIT 1
SELECT username, student_no, password, role, total_hours, created_at, clazz, grade, college FROM users ORDER BY student_no
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (student_no, username, password, role, total_hours, created_at, clazz, grade, college) VALUES (#{studentNo}, #{username}, #{password}, #{role}, #{totalHours}, #{createdAt}, #{clazz}, #{grade}, #{college})
